Generate a clean full-body reference view of character shown in the picture, keeping face details, age, identity, outfit and hairstyle consistent, they must be same.

Describe the key features of the input image (color, shape, size, texture, objects, background), then explain how the user's text instruction should alter or modify the image. Generate a new image that meets the user's requirements while maintaining consistency with the original input where appropriate.

Describe the key features of the input image (color, shape, size, texture, objects, background), then explain how the user's text instruction should alter or modify the image. Generate a new image that meets the user's requirements while maintaining consistency with the original input where appropriate.

Describe the key features of the input image (color, shape, size, texture, objects, background), then explain how the user's text instruction should alter or modify the image. Generate a new image that meets the user's requirements while maintaining consistency with the original input where appropriate.

# 输入数字切换生成图片分辨率
# “0”：输出图分辨率将参考输入图的比例
# “1”：将使用#127号节点中的分辨率设置（默认为768*1344）

# Enter a number to switch the generated image resolution
# "0": The resolution of the output image will be referenced to the scale of the input image.
# "1": The resolution setting in node #127 will be used (the default is 768*1344).

Describe the key features of the input image (color, shape, size, texture, objects, background), then explain how the user's text instruction should alter or modify the image. Generate a new image that meets the user's requirements while maintaining consistency with the original input where appropriate.

Full-body front view of the character, {__pose_type__}, {__gaze_direction__}, {__action_detail__}, {__facial_expression__}, {__body_language__}, {__outfit_detail__}, clean white background, professional character design, consistent lighting, make sure the entire body is visible. Keep the character's appearance perfectly consistent.

Full-body front view of the character, contemplative pose, downward gaze, gesturing casually, neutral expression, ready position, formal wear, clean white background, professional character design, consistent lighting, make sure the entire body is visible. Keep the character's appearance perfectly consistent.
Full-body front view of the character, make sure the entire body is visible. Keep the character’s appearance perfectly consistent.

Image must contain full-body back view of the character, {__pose_type__}, rear perspective, {__action_detail__}, {__body_language__}, {__outfit_detail__}, clean white background, professional character design, consistent lighting, make sure the entire body is visible. Keep the character's appearance perfectly consistent.

Full-body front view of the character, contemplative pose, downward gaze, gesturing casually, neutral expression, ready position, formal wear, clean white background, professional character design, consistent lighting, make sure the entire body is visible. Keep the character's appearance perfectly consistent.
Full-body back view of the character, with the entire body visible. Keep the character’s appearance perfectly consistent with the front and side views.
Full-body side view of the character, with the entire body visible. Keep the character’s appearance perfectly consistent with the other views.

Full-body side view of the character, {__pose_type__}, {__gaze_direction__}, {__action_detail__}, {__facial_expression__}, {__body_language__}, {__outfit_detail__}, clean white background, professional character design, consistent lighting, make sure the entire body is visible. Keep the character's appearance perfectly consistent.

Full-body front view of the character, contemplative pose, downward gaze, gesturing casually, neutral expression, ready position, formal wear, clean white background, professional character design, consistent lighting, make sure the entire body is visible. Keep the character's appearance perfectly consistent.
